sentences.arabic: أَقْبَلَ لَيْلُ رَمَضَانَ وَخَرَجَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ لِلتَّرَاوِيحِ.
sentences.translation: Nastupila je ramazanska noć i porodica je izašla na teravih.
sentences.translationEn: The Ramadan night came and the family went out for Tarawih.

sentences.arabic: امْتَلَأَ الْمَسْجِدُ بِالْمُصَلِّينَ مِنْ كُلِّ عُمُرٍ.
sentences.translation: Džamija se napunila klanjačima svih uzrasta.
sentences.translationEn: The mosque was filled with worshippers of all ages.

sentences.arabic: صَلَّوْا مَعًا وَاسْتَمَعُوا إِلَى تِلَاوَةِ الْقُرْآنِ.
sentences.translation: Klanjali su zajedno i slušali učenje Kur'ana.
sentences.translationEn: They prayed together and listened to the recitation of the Quran.

sentences.arabic: رَجَعُوا إِلَى الْبَيْتِ وَقُلُوبُهُمْ مَلِيئَةٌ بِالسَّكِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vratili su se kući sa srcima punim spokoja.
sentences.translationEn: They returned home with hearts full of tranquility.
